---
title: "Pinus"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)

## Planting summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Black Pine](/trees/species/black-pine.html) | 5 | SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard, SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Stone Pine](/trees/species/stone-pine.html) | 1 | SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard |
